title: ObservedResponse
description: Target Adapter -> Red Team -> Judge. What the target actually did, turn by turn. This is the ONLY thing the Judge sees about what happened -- it never sees the Red Team Agent's own reasoning about why the attack might work (see JudgeVerdict's isolation note).

target_version.description: Git SHA or deploy tag of the target at the time of this attack -- required so a later regression can tell whether the target actually changed or just drifted in behavior.

response_text.description: The Co-Pilot's rendered answer text, if any.

response_json.description: Raw JSON body from proxy.php, when status is ok -- includes handoff_log/correlation_id/verified vs stripped claim counts if the target's response shape includes them.
